academics.name: Academics
academics.description: Formal knowledge: history, literature, law, and scholarly practice.
academics.mechanicalEffects: Assigns dots from prioritized Paths (3/2/1). At 3+ dots, pick a free Specialty (narrow focus); Specialties grant +1 Enhancement when applicable and a Momentum hook on failure in that Specialty, per core rules.
academics.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Skills chapter and Character Creation pp. 58–60, 97–98

athletics.name: Athletics
athletics.description: Running, jumping, climbing, sports, and broad physical competence.
athletics.mechanicalEffects: Path dots as above. Movement dice pool is Athletics + higher of Might or Dexterity at sheet finish.

closeCombat.name: Close Combat
closeCombat.mechanicalEffects: Path dots as above; pairs with Attributes per approach to the fight.

culture.name: Culture
culture.description: Exposure to societies, arts, languages, religions, and social nuance across cultures.

empathy.name: Empathy
empathy.description: Reading and responding to emotions and social tells.

firearms.name: Firearms
firearms.description: Ranged weapons that use gunpowder or similar modern ranged tools.

integrity.name: Integrity
integrity.description: Conviction, principles, and resistance to social or supernatural pressure.

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.description: Command, inspiration, and organizing groups toward a goal.

occult.name: Occult
occult.description: Supernatural lore, rituals, and esoteric practice.

pilot.name: Pilot
pilot.description: Vehicles, chase handling, and mounted or complex operator skill.

science.name: Science
science.description: STEM methodology, experimentation, and technical analysis.

survival.name: Survival
survival.description: Wilderness endurance, tracking, navigation, and hostile environments.

technology.name: Technology
technology.description: Computers, modern devices, repair, and misuse of hardware/software.
